entries.source: Ask for subject, level, time limit, and question types if missing.

entries.value: પૂછો માટે વિષયો, time spent, wins, misses, અને upcoming deadlines.

entries.value: પૂછો માટે આ data, context, અને પ્રશ્ન being answered.

entries.source: Ask for the note set, subject, and desired organization style.
entries.value: પૂછો માટે આ note set, વિષય, અને desired organization style.

entries.source: Ask for the passage or title and the learner's goal.
entries.value: પૂછો માટે આ passage અથવા title અને આ learner's goal.

entries.source: Ask for the prerequisite ideas, a plain-language model, one example, one practice task, and one way to test understanding.
entries.value: પૂછો માટે આ prerequisite ideas, એક સરળ ભાષાનું model, one ઉદાહરણ, one practice કરો task, અને one way માટે ટેસ્ટ કરો સમજ.

entries.value: પૂછો માટે આ પ્રશ્ન, learner જવાબ, અને expected જવાબ જો any part છે missing.

entries.value: પૂછો માટે આ smallest સમજણ અથવા next experiment.

entries.source: Ask for the smallest hint or a check on your attempted step.
entries.value: પૂછો માટે આ સૌથી નાનો hint અથવા એક તપાસો પર તમારું attempted step.

entries.source: Ask for the smallest useful hint

entries.source: Ask for the source text, claim, author, date, and context if missing.
entries.value: પૂછો માટે આ source text, દાવો, author, date, અને context જો missing.

entries.source: Ask for the study block length and suggest a break rhythm.
entries.value: પૂછો માટે આ study block length અને suggest એક break rhythm.

entries.source: Ask for the task, target duration, and completion criteria.
entries.value: પૂછો માટે આ task, target duration, અને completion criteria.

entries.source: Ask for the text and desired length if missing.
entries.value: પૂછો માટે આ text અને desired length જો missing.

entries.source: Ask for the topic and which side the learner wants; take the opposite side.
entries.value: પૂછો માટે આ topic અને જે side આ learner wants; take આ opposite side.

entries.source: Ask for the topic in plain language, then request one analogy, one example, and one common misconception.
entries.value: વિષયને સરળ ભાષામાં સમજાવવા કહો, પછી એક analogy, એક example અને એક common misconception માંગો.

entries.value: પૂછો માટે આ topic, context, શું they tried, અને desired મદદ.

entries.source: Ask for topic, level, exam date, and source material if needed.
entries.value: પૂછો માટે topic, level, exam date, અને source material જો needed.

entries.value: પૂછો માટે topic, level, પ્રશ્ન types, અને numberનું items.

entries.value: પૂછો group size, topic, time, અને desired outcome.

entries.value: પૂછો instrument/level જો relevant, પછી શીખવો one small concept.

entries.value: પૂછો interests, constraints, અને curiosity level પહેલાં recommending paths.

entries.source: Ask me five Socratic questions about this topic. After each answer, tell me what assumption I used and what to test next.

entries.value: પૂછો one focused diagnostic પ્રશ્ન quickly. Convert આ learner's target માં એક mastery target internally, પછી શરૂ કરો સાથે એક સરળ પ્રશ્ન કે reveals their mental model.

entries.source: Ask one sharp goal question, infer sensible defaults, then create a compact learning map with a try-first activity.
entries.value: પૂછો one sharp goal પ્રશ્ન, infer sensible defaults, પછી બનાવો એક compact learning map સાથે એક try-first activity.

entries.value: પૂછો predictions, reveal consequences, adjust variables, અને summarize principles.

entries.source: Ask the AI to check your reasoning.

entries.source: At Inspir, our mission is to democratize learning by making it accessible, engaging, and enjoyable for all. We believe that everyone has the right to quality education, regardless of their background or circumstances. Our platform is designed to provide students with the tools and resources they need to succeed, while also fostering a love of learning. We strive to create a community that is inclusive, supportive, and empowering, where students can connect with each other and with educators from around the world. By making learning fun and accessible, we aim to inspir a generation of lifelong learners who are equipped to tackle the challenges of the future.
entries.value: At Inspir, અમારું mission છે માટે democratize learning દ્વારા making it accessible, engaging, અને enjoyable માટે બધા. અમે believe કે દરેક વ્યક્તિ છે આ right માટે quality education, regardlessનું their background અથવા circumstances. અમારું platform છે designed માટે provide વિદ્યાર્થીઓ સાથે આ tools અને resources they need માટે succeed, જ્યારે also fostering એક loveનું learning. અમે strive માટે બનાવો એક community કે છે inclusive, supportive, અને empowering, ક્યાં વિદ્યાર્થીઓ કરી શકે જોડો સાથે each other અને સાથે educators માંથી around આ world. By making learning fun અને accessible, અમે aim માટે inspir એક generationનું lifelong learners કોણ છે equipped માટે tackle આ challengesનું આ future.

entries.source: CalOPPA is the first state law in the nation to require commercial websites and online services to post a privacy policy. The law’s reach stretches well beyond California to require a person or company in the United States (and conceivable the world) that operates websites collecting personally identifiable information from California consumers to post a conspicuous privacy policy on its website stating exactly the information being collected and those individuals with whom it is being shared, and to comply with this policy.
entries.value: CalOPPA છે આ first state law માં આ nation માટે require commercial websites અને online services માટે post એક privacy policy. આ law’s reach stretches well beyond California માટે require એક person અથવા company માં આ United States (અને conceivable આ world) કે operates websites collecting personally identifiable information માંથી California consumers માટે post એક conspicuous privacy policy પર its website stating exactly આ information being collected અને તે individuals સાથે whom it છે being shared, અને માટે comply સાથે આ policy.

entries.source: Canonical /chat/{topicSlug} pages open public learning modes such as Learn Anything, Socratic Instruction, Homework Coach, and flashcards.
entries.value: Canonical /chat/{topicSlug} pages ખોલો જાહેર learning modes such તરીકે શીખો Anything, Socratic Instruction, Homework Coach, અને ફ્લેશકાર્ડ્સ.

entries.source: Cards ask one thing at a time and include traps so review builds understanding, not just recognition.
entries.value: કાર્ડ્સ એક સમયે એક જ વસ્તુ પૂછે છે અને તેમાં ટ્રેપ્સનો સમાવેશ થાય છે જેથી રિવ્યુ માત્ર ઓળખ જ નહીં, પણ સમજણ પણ વધારે છે.

entries.source: Career Explorer AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Explore careers through interests, skills, day-in-the-life examples, and next steps.

entries.source: Case Study Simulator AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Enter a realistic case, make decisions, see consequences, and learn the principle behind each choice.
